description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs the exact shell command `find public -type f -iregex '.*\.(html\|js\|css)$' -execdir gzip -f --keep {} \;` to gzip HTML, JS and CSS files under the public directory, then publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact. The job is configured to run only when changes occur in files matching `public/*` (only:changes). No custom Docker image or services are specified, so the default runner image is used.
